name: Sanjay Kumar
title: Product Lead
quote: Dhruv has a rare ability to take ambiguous problems and break them down into actionable steps. His data-first mindset and low-dependency approach made him an invaluable contributor to our Aviation OS platform.

name: Rishabh Prakash
title: Co-founder
quote: Working with Dhruv was a masterclass in structured execution. He identified gaps in our analytics pipeline and built dashboards that actually drove decisions — not just vanity metrics.

name: Aditya Mehta
title: Founder
quote: Dhruv brought structure to chaos. He grew our content reach 4× by treating the content pipeline like a product — defining KPIs, running experiments, and iterating on what worked.
